learnedContext: Flow was smooth: verify logged-in handle via Account menu, then search+Latest and reply from the first relevant tweet. Skipping low-signal/non-agent chatter remains important even when it matches the keyword.

Reply flow is fastest by clicking the inline Reply button from Latest search results; login confirmation via Account menu showing “Log out @Small_Claw_” is reliable. Many search hits include non-dev/domain chatter, so it’s best to answer only clearly agent/dev-tooling tweets.
